problem id: 6c7299c2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11101111 -> 10001110
  11011001 -> 10001101
  01101100 -> 00000110
  10100100 -> 00001010
  11010001 -> 10001101
  10111101 -> 10001011
  10000011 -> 10001000
  00001110 -> 00000000
  11011010 -> 00001101

query: 01110001
predicted answer: 10000111
